choice: All accounts at E*TRADE incl. rollover IRAs — fully API-visible
rationale: Decision 3f1b6b21 explicitly states 'All household accounts are at E*TRADE' as the justification for using the E*TRADE Accounts API directly. The context note clarifies that what the Excel calls a '401(k)' bucket is already rolled-over into rollover IRA accounts held at E*TRADE — not at a separate employer plan. Therefore both the tax-deferred bucket (rollover IRAs) and the post-tax brokerage bucket are E*TRADE accounts and will be returned by the E*TRADE Accounts API. No manual entry or third-party institution is needed.
